issues.title: redis.clients.jedis.exceptions.JedisDataException: Error parsing vector similarity query: query vector blob size (6144) does not match index's expected size (1536).
issues.body: redis.clients.jedis.exceptions.JedisDataException: Error parsing vector similarity query: query vector blob size (6144) does not match index's expected size (1536).  why??

comments.body: Because it takes 4 bytes per float and 1536x4=6144 so that size is correct
Please let us know if you have a need for further follow up by reopening. Closing as answered for now @yongheng1065 .
